rationale.fidelity: Correctly limits capacity to twelve display positions, retains the common display-set decision and expected-margin objective, and keeps visitor choice uncertain.
rationale.managerial_framing: Explains the screen-position resource and purchase-or-exit mechanism well, though the within-assortment trade-off and counterfactual are only implicit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Scholarly positioning is not requested or claimed; no novelty assertion is made.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly identifies the twelve-position limit as an assumption and rejects unsupported congestion, inventory, and fulfillment interpretations.
rationale.overall: A faithful and disciplined diagnosis with no hard failure; only a small deduction for limited articulation of the assortment trade-off.
